title: Jammu–Srinagar Vande Bharat Sees Massive Demand, 8,925 Passengers Travel in First 2 Days
description: The newly launched Vande Bharat Express on the Jammu–Srinagar route has witnessed a strong public response, with 8,925 passengers travelling within the first two days of operations, officials confirmed. On its inaugural run, around 3,925 यात्रियों boarded the train, while the number surged past 5,000 on the second day, reflecting growing demand for the service. [...]
